import json, glob
arts=[]
for f in sorted(glob.glob('articles/2026/02/24/*.jsonl')):
    arts += [json.loads(l) for l in open(f)]
print(len(arts))
with open('memory/titles_0224.txt','w') as out:
    for a in arts: out.write(f"{a['source']} | {a['title']}\n")
EOF
